title: Crunchy Courgette Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional quesadillas, this Mexican-inspired dish features crispy courgette slices and gooey cheese.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Slice the courgette into thin rounds and season with salt and Mexican seasoning.
Place the courgette slices in the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until crispy.
In a separate pan, warm the tortillas over medium heat.
Assemble the quesadillas by placing a spoonful of cooked courgette on half of the tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook the quesadillas for 2-3 minutes per side, until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve with crispy taco shells on the side.
